title: Notifications  - Device updating OFF
scenario: Device Software Update notification is suppressed when notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts, even during background firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update
steps: Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Set 'Device Software Update' toggle to OFF
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Go to Device Settings → Software Update
Press the Home button or switch to another app to send Poly Studio Mobile to the background
expected: No notification is shown for the device firmware update when the app is in the background.
